body:
So earlier I saw a post that was just “Boobs in My Mouth” and was like yay boobies! Only then I realized I had to parody S.I.M.P. (Squirrels In My Pants). Only I found out very quickly very little rhymed with mouth, so I took liberties with my inspiration…and my muse was amused. (Takei: Oh my!) Pun obviously intended!

So without further adieu:

B.I.M.F. - Boobs in My Face

[Intro] There’s boobs in my face!

[Verse 1]

Tell me what’s makin’ you suck like that
B-I-M-F, boobs in my face
Ain’t got no chickens, ain’t got no rats
B-I-M-F, boobs in my face!
B to the I to the M to the F
Then maybe you can be jigglin like Steph

[Chorus]

Step right over and watch me put it down
(Boobs, boobs) B to the I to the M to the F
Step right over and watch me put it
B to the I to M to the F

[Verse 2]

Who you got back home setting your pace?
B-I-M-F, boobs in my face
Hard to argue when you’re see this grace
B-I-M-F, boobs in my face
(Yeah) Hypnotize me, put me in a daze
B-I-M-F, boobs in my face
Got an Aunt Florence,
reblog_comment:
So earlier I saw a post that was just “Boobs in My Mouth” and was like yay boobies! Only then I realized I had to parody S.I.M.P. (Squirrels In My Pants). Only I found out very quickly very little rhymed with mouth, so I took liberties with my inspiration…and my muse was amused. (Takei: Oh my!) Pun obviously intended!

So without further adieu:

B.I.M.F. - Boobs in My Face

[Intro] There’s boobs in my face!

[Verse 1]

Tell me what’s makin’ you suck like that
B-I-M-F, boobs in my face
Ain’t got no chickens, ain’t got no rats
B-I-M-F, boobs in my face!
B to the I to the M to the F
Then maybe you can be jigglin like Steph

[Chorus]

Step right over and watch me put it down
(Boobs, boobs) B to the I to the M to the F
Step right over and watch me put it
B to the I to M to the F

[Verse 2]

Who you got back home setting your pace?
B-I-M-F, boobs in my face
Hard to argue when you’re see this grace
B-I-M-F, boobs in my face
(Yeah) Hypnotize me, put me in a daze
B-I-M-F, boobs in my face
Got an Aunt Florence, quite the basket case
She can’t see the boobs in my face

[Chorus]

[Verse 3]
If you wanna know why I’m losing the race
B-I-M-F, boobs in my face
Doctor says I need a little more space
B-I-M-F, boobs in my face
Yeah, proletariat is stone cold deaf
Baby come and listen to my treble clef
Everybody bow before the chef
B to the I to the M to the F

[Chorus]

[Bridge]
(B) B to the I to the M to the F
(I) B to the I to the M to the F
(M) If your pockets are empty find yourself a base
(Yes) B to the I to the M to the F
(Boobs, boobs) B to the I to the M to the F
(B) If you’re losin’ your hair you’ve still got your face
(I) If you’re wrestlin’ a bear you’re in the wrong place
(M) Old Uncle Freddy needs to give her some space
